hero.name: Piyush Jain

about.title: About Me

jarvis.title: Jarvis AI Assistant
jarvis.desc: A robust voice-activated AI assistant for macOS capable of executing desktop automation, web scraping, and interacting with LLMs.

job_bot.title: Auto-Job Apply Bot
job_bot.desc: Selenium-based automation tool to find and apply for relevant jobs on platforms like LinkedIn, generating AI cover letters.

netflix.title: Netflix Clone
netflix.desc: A full-stack streaming platform clone with user authentication, database integration, and TMDB API for real-time movie data.

weather.title: Weather App
weather.desc: A responsive weather application fetching real-time data using the OpenWeather API with dynamic UI based on conditions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's build something extraordinary.
contact.desc: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question, a project idea, or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

footer.cta_title: HAVE AN EXCITING PROJECT IN MIND?

projects_list.title: Curio
projects_list.desc: A premium platform integrating diverse AI models into a unified interface for seamless experimentation and workflow automation.

projects_list.title: Agro AI
projects_list.desc: Predictive analytics system for farmers, utilizing climate data and deep learning models to forecast crop yields and detect diseases.

projects_list.title: Cyber Guardian
projects_list.desc: Automated threat detection system analyzing network logs in real-time utilizing anomaly detection algorithms.

projects_list.title: Hostel Leave Management
projects_list.desc: A full-stack hostel leave management system enabling students to apply for leaves, track approval status, and allowing wardens to manage requests via an admin dashboard.

projects_list.title: StreamHub
projects_list.desc: A sleek, Netflix-inspired video streaming platform with dynamic content discovery, trending carousels, genre filtering, and a cinematic UI built for modern audiences.

projects_list.title: MediCare+
projects_list.desc: A premium healthcare appointment booking platform featuring doctor discovery, real-time slot availability, health metrics tracking, and a seamless patient-doctor interface.

projects_list.title: Maison Dorée
projects_list.desc: An elegant luxury restaurant web experience featuring a curated menu, table reservation system, and an immersive fine-dining aesthetic with rich typography and ambient design.

projects_list.title: The Bodyline GYM
projects_list.desc: A high-impact gym fitness website with membership plans, workout class schedules, trainer profiles, and a bold dark theme with neon orange accents.

projects_list.title: Health Center
projects_list.desc: A professional medical website showcasing healthcare services including cardiology, dentistry, and orthopedics, with a doctor directory and online appointment booking.

projects_list.title: Inner Peace
projects_list.desc: A serene mindfulness and mental wellness website featuring guided meditation resources, yoga practices, breathing exercises, and a calming lavender and sage green aesthetic.

projects_list.title: Restaurant Website
projects_list.desc: A warm and inviting restaurant website with a hero food banner, menu categories, table reservation form, and smooth navigation across Home, About, Work and Service sections.

projects_list.title: Limbo Reflex Game
projects_list.desc: A fast-paced browser reflex game where players dodge a moving bar using keyboard controls. Features score tracking, lives system, and a neon retro arcade aesthetic.

projects_list.title: Tic Tac Toe
projects_list.desc: A stylish two-player Tic Tac Toe game with a glowing neon UI, win detection, score tracking per player, and a satisfying animated winner announcement overlay.

projects_list.title: Rock Paper Scissors
projects_list.desc: A neon cyberpunk edition of Rock Paper Scissors where players battle the computer. Features glowing choice buttons, animated WIN/LOSE/DRAW results, and a live scoreboard.

projects_list.title: Mines
projects_list.desc: A strategic browser-based logic game where players must uncover safe tiles while avoiding hidden mines. Built with vanilla web technologies for a smooth interactive experience.

chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm Piyush's AI assistant. Ask me about his skills, projects, or experience!
chatbot.fallback: I'm not sure about that. Try asking about his skills, projects, or contact info!
chatbot.res_who: I am an AI assistant representing Piyush Jain. Piyush is a Full-Stack Software Engineer who loves building robust backend systems.
chatbot.res_projects: Piyush has built several projects including Curio, Agro AI, StreamHub, Cyber Guardian, and AI Analytics Suite. You can view them in the Projects section.
chatbot.res_skills: Piyush excels in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Docker, and AWS.
chatbot.res_education: He is constantly learning and building, turning caffeine into code.
chatbot.res_contact: You can reach Piyush at Piyushjain1857@gmail.com or call +91 8595850153.
chatbot.res_experience: He has extensive experience in Full-Stack development and AI/ML integrations, having participated in various hackathons and leadership roles.
